description: Bootstrap candidate goldset for Tajwid Engine v3. Structurally suitable for detector development, but not a production oracle until independent reference comparison and expert talaqqi review are completed. Extended through Stage 5F with deterministic nun/tanwin, mim-sakinah, ghunnah-mushaddadah, and qalqalah cases. Stage 5G adds exact-span deterministic mad cases. Stage 5J menambahkan decision-table Ra Tafkhim/Tarqiq dan lexical exceptions. Stage 5L adds Hamzat Wasl, explicit silent-letter marks, profile saktah boundaries, and waqf-sign metadata cases.

cases.notes: Stage 5E refinement: display span highlights the mim trigger; context still includes the target letter.
Candidate bootstrap. Belum boleh menjadi oracle production sebelum validasi ahli.
